description: Framework for optimizing content to be cited by AI search engines

checks: Clear, quotable definitions for key terms
Concise sentences under 20 words for key claims
Structured H2/H3 hierarchy matching common queries
FAQ section with direct Q&A format
Comparative data (tables, charts described in text)

aiEngines.name: Google AI Overviews
aiEngines.queryPattern: Search Google for '[query]' and check AI Overview
aiEngines.citationStyle: Sources shown as links below the overview

aiEngines.name: ChatGPT Search
aiEngines.citationStyle: Sources listed at bottom of response

scoringGuide.0-20: Invisible — not mentioned in any AI engine responses
scoringGuide.21-40: Barely visible — occasional mention without citation
scoringGuide.41-60: Emerging — cited in some queries, inconsistent
scoringGuide.61-80: Visible — regularly cited with positive framing
scoringGuide.81-100: Authority — primary cited source across AI engines
